subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1916-08-20 in Nazareth
subcodes.first_line: God willing, the sun of tranquility and repose will soon dawn above the horizon of this world and mankind will [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله شمس راحت و آسایش بزودی از افق اینجهان طلوع خواهد نمود و مردم در
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @war and peace, @Christ; Christianity, @prayer for peace and unity, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization
